message.content:
@startuml

actor "sidetree-core-go" as client

box "Instance 1" #LightGray
participant "Operation\nQueue" as OQ1
end box

participant "orb.operation" as orb

database "op-queue\nDB" as DB

box "Instance 2" #LightGray
participant "Operation\nQueue" as OQ2
end box

OQ1 -> orb : Subscribe
orb --> OQ1 : ok

OQ2 -> orb : Subscribe
orb --> OQ2 : ok

client -> OQ1 : Add(op1)
OQ1 -> orb : Publish(op1)
orb --> OQ1 : ok
OQ1 --> client : ok

client -> OQ1 : Add(op2)
OQ1 -> orb : Publish(op2)
orb --> OQ1 : ok
OQ1 --> client : ok

OQ1 -> OQ1 : op2
OQ1 -> orb : ok
OQ1 -> DB : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
DB --> OQ1 : ok
OQ1 -> orb : Ack(op2)
orb --> OQ1 : ok

OQ2 -> orb : op1
orb --> OQ2 : ok
OQ2 -> DB : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
DB --> OQ2 : ok
OQ2 -> orb : Ack(op1)
orb --> OQ2 : ok

@enduml
